3078470.name: Smol Survivors Demo
3078470.description:
Smol Survivors is a 2D reverse bullet-heck where smol blocks have become lost and need to find their friends and a way back home while fighting through hordes of enemies.

What can I do to make sure I stay safe?

  • Collect weapons and upgrade them using enemy essence

  • Purchase badges to modify aspects of combat using coins

  • Find other blocks using the gacha system

Okay, how do I do any of that?

  • Weapons can be collected and upgraded during combat at no extra cost

  • Take on urgent quests from the quest board to find and bring back important lost blocks that will lend you their services

  • Save up enough money to take a spin at Capsule's gacha shop

Sounds easy enough, anything else I should know?

  • When in doubt, complete an expedition in the most recently discovered area

  • There's bigger and badder things beyond the portal that we've labeled as "bosses." These will need to be dealt with to proceed at times.

That sounds dangerous...

  • Yup it sure is! But it's okay, because you're a Smol Survivor.
